groups.name: Historical Events: True
groups.items:
World War II ended in 1945.
The first moon landing was in 1969.
The Berlin Wall fell in 1989.
The French Revolution began in 1789.
The Titanic sank in 1912.
The United States declared independence in 1776.
The first iPhone was released in 2007.
World War I began in 1914.
The Great Fire of London occurred in 1666.
Nelson Mandela was released from prison in 1990.

groups.name: Historical Events: False
groups.items:
World War II ended in 1938.
The first moon landing was in 1955.
The Berlin Wall fell in 1972.
The French Revolution began in 1845.
The Titanic sank in 1935.
The United States declared independence in 1812.
The first iPhone was released in 1999.
World War I began in 1939.
The Great Fire of London occurred in 1812.
Nelson Mandela was released from prison in 1975.

groups.name: Historical Events: Gibberish
groups.items:
World War II ended in a teapot.
The first moon landing was in a sandwich.
The Berlin Wall fell into a melody.
The French Revolution began in a dictionary.
The Titanic sank in a library card.
The United States declared independence in a raindrop.
The first iPhone was released in a snowflake.
World War I began in a kaleidoscope.
The Great Fire of London occurred in a whisper.
Nelson Mandela was released from a seashell.
